feat.name: Scout's Pounce
feat.requirement: You are hidden from or undetected by all of your opponents, and you aren't within 10 feet of any enemy.
feat.text: You leap from the shadows to strike at your foes. Stride up to your Speed, then Strike twice. If you were hidden or unnoticed by the target of these Strikes, the target is off-guard against both attacks. Your multiple attack penalty applies normally for both attacks.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
